mapper.select: SELECT id,history_id AS historyId,user_id AS userId,role,content,created_at AS createTime,updated_at AS updateTime,is_file AS isFile FROM messages WHERE id=#{id} AND history_id=#{historyId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE history_id=#{historyId}

SELECT id,history_id AS historyId,user_id AS userId,role,content,created_at AS createTime,updated_at AS updateTime,is_file AS isFile FROM messages WHERE history_id=#{historyId} AND (created_at < #{before} OR (created_at = #{before} AND id < #{beforeId})) ORDER BY created_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM messages WHERE history_id=#{historyId} AND id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT m.id,m.history_id AS historyId,h.user_id AS userId,m.role,m.content,m.created_at AS createTime,m.updated_at AS updateTime,m.is_file AS isFile FROM messages m JOIN history h ON h.id=m.history_id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC,m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m JOIN history h ON h.id=m.history_id
